title: delphinium ajacis var. orientale
intro: Delphinium ajacis var. orientale, commonly known as the Oriental Larkspur, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Delphinium genus, native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its root and seeds, which contain delphinine and other alkaloids with sedative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Oriental Larkspur include its ability to treat anxiety, insomnia, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Traditional herbal preparations of Oriental Larkspur include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support the nervous system and promote relaxation.
